findings: stampede.sh uses round-robin rotation ONLY when multiple --models supplied: MODEL_LIST parsed, assignment via (worker_num-1) % MODEL_COUNT. bin/stampede.sh:603-605,723,850-853,867,943-953
DEFAULT model is claude-haiku-4.5 (a BANNED model): bin/stampede.sh:15-16. If no --model/--models passed, all launched agents receive a banned model.

Metaswarm child Squad Lead/Worker model assignment is instruction-level only: premium pool and banned list injected via prompt metadata, not enforced by launcher code. bin/stampede.sh:739-756,793-810,883-888
SKILL.md instructs static --model usage; does not mention --models, rotation, or round-robin. Default shown is claude-sonnet-4.5. skills/SKILL.md:33-39,399-415,884
GAP: No banned-model validation gate in stampede.sh before launch. Preflight only validates run_id/count/repo. bin/stampede.sh:491-509,603-605
